description: Collapsible add student form + auto-update fix
changes: ✅ Add Student form now hidden by default — tap to open
✅ Form auto-closes after adding a student
✅ Scrolls to student list after adding
🔄 Fixed PWA auto-update — app now updates itself
🗑️ Old cache cleared automatically on update
📤 WhatsApp/Telegram now shares actual backup file
🟡 Due Soon badge 3 days before monthly fee date
📥 Excel import fixed to match export format
